all: 'widget_count' is provided by My::Plugin::Widgets, which no workspace entrypoint loads

rows.note: Widgets is a workspace plugin nothing loads — the lint fires at the usage site. Confy IS loaded (app.pl `plugin 'Confy'`), so its helper stays silent: both directions of the entrypoint scan in one sweep.

all: key 'alpa' is not in $conf's literal shape (keys: alpha, beta)

rows.note: The $conf typo hint proves the whole loader-config chain: the PluginLoad fact from a PACKAGELESS lite entrypoint, the registration-time shape projection, the enrichment join, and the resulting CLOSED HashWithKeys{alpha, beta} feeding the unknown-hash-key diagnostic.
